channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1825] Test failure on test suite runtests, subtest runtests
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3d354e28-f43a-11e1-8032-52540035b04c.

The sub-test runtests failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

copying 719 files from /etc /bin to /mnt/lustre/runtest.6746/etc /bin at Thu Aug 30 16:24:43 PDT 2012
tar: Removing leading `/' from member names
tar: etc/sysconfig/quota_nld: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/crond: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/ntpdate: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/prelink: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/sshd: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/kdump: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/iptables-config: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/sysconfig/init: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/quotagrpadmins: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/certs/Makefile: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.trust.crt: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/certs/make-dummy-cert: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-bundle.crt: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/openssl.cnf: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/misc/c_info: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/misc/CA: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/misc/c_hash: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/misc/c_issuer: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/tls/misc/c_name: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/java/cacerts: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-6: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-Security-6: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-Testing-6: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-Debug-6: Cannot open: Input/output error
tar: etc/pki/nssdb/key3.db: Cannot open: Input/output error
item.summary: Test failure on test suite runtests, subtest runtests

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: I was looking at runtests related Lu's and it just seems this one is safe to close. Runtest is currently running in Master without these issues. Please reopen if this is still an issue.
